description: Edge: Mirror/Overclock combo setup — highest variance hand

enemy.name: The Algorithm
enemy.special: Phase 2 intents: Rapid queries (4×4=16), Memory wipe (weakness 2 turns), Backup restore (heal 6).

hand.name: Overclock
hand.description: Next card has 2× effect. Costs 2 AP.

hand.name: Slow
hand.description: Skip enemy's next defend or buff. Enemy intending HEAL — Slow cancels it!

relics.name: Quicksilver Quill
relics.description: Charge correct in under 2 seconds: extra 1.5× multiplier.

notes: EDGE CASE: Overclock + Mirror combo. Overclock doubles next card (2 AP). With 3 AP: Overclock(2) + Piercing(1) = 3 AP total — Overclock makes Piercing hit for 2× (bypasses block). OR Slow(2) cancels the self-repair + free Piercing(1). Algorithm phase 2 heals for 6, so Slow is very efficient. But Overclock+Heavy Strike would cost 2+2+1surcharge=5 AP (impossible). The Quicksilver Quill rewards fast answers but Overclock is already invested. Chain 3 provides damage multiplier. What does Slow's 'skip defend/buff' do to a 'heal' intent — does it cancel healing too?
